brief_notes: Impressive multi-technique study combining electrophysiology, two-photon calcium imaging, pharmacology, conditional knockout, proteomics, and FRET metabolite sensors. Tables present frequency-dependent calcium responses, dose-dependent K+ effects with post-hoc comparisons, comprehensive pharmacological dissection, CAP properties, proteomics with fold changes, and axonal metabolite measurements. The near-complete loss of activity-driven glucose consumption in cKO is a striking finding. Statistical reporting includes one-way ANOVA with Tukey's, paired t-tests, and explicit p-values throughout.
